known_before_lock.C73_status: prospectively specified retrospective robustness and instrumentation readiness; not independent confirmation

allowed: committed compact C72 summaries and tables
checkpoint, model, and preprocessing ABI metadata inspection
CPU dummy-tensor hook tests with no real EEG trials

data_roles.T2: retrospective calibration and robustness estimation only
data_roles.T3_HO: retrospective locked-rule replay only; not new confirmation
data_roles.new_independent_confirmation_requires: new checkpoint fields, new reserved-seed checkpoint universe, new targets, or new dataset

decomposition.order_averaging: uniform mean over all 120 component orders
decomposition.shapley_rule: exact subset-value Shapley only where one coherent counterfactual value function exists; otherwise label order-averaged attribution
decomposition.dominance_rule: a component is dominant only when its 95 percent target-cluster bootstrap lower bound exceeds every competing component upper bound and it is largest in at least 90 percent of sequential orders
decomposition.mixed_unresolved_rule: use mixed unresolved attribution whenever dominance_rule fails or order range exceeds 0.20 of the observed gap

endpoint_registry.bAcc: macro class recall; higher is better
endpoint_registry.NLL: negative mean true-class log probability; higher oriented value is better
endpoint_registry.ECE: negative 15-bin ECE; higher oriented value is better
endpoint_registry.continuous_joint_utility: equal mean of within-target midrank percentiles for bAcc, -NLL, -ECE
endpoint_registry.primary_joint_good: all three oriented endpoint midranks at or above 0.75

candidate_geometry.epsilon_rule_T2_only: epsilon values are T2 target-universe best-minus-second gap quantiles q25, q50, q75 plus fixed 0 and 0.02; deduplicate after calculation; replay unchanged on T3-HO
candidate_geometry.epsilon_optimal_set: number of candidates with utility at least best-epsilon
candidate_geometry.effective_multiplicity_temperature_T2_on: T2 median positive target-universe best-minus-second bAcc gap
candidate_geometry.effective_multiplicity: inverse Simpson size of weights proportional to exp((utility-best)/temperature)
candidate_geometry.control_warning: top1 enrichment over random is contextual only and is never sufficient evidence of reliable control

bootstrap_and_inference.multiplicity: Holm correction within H3/H4/H5/H6 robustness family; max-stat simultaneous bootstrap intervals across primary endpoints

residual_construct_validation.cross_fit: fit source/construction/shared-calibration prediction on T2 folds or construction split A and evaluate on disjoint split B/T3-HO
required: incremental prediction after source, construction, and shared calibration

H3_shared_calibration.effects: T2-locked shared class-vector and temperature minus no-intervention, evaluated per target
H3_shared_calibration.equivalence: practically insufficient only if simultaneous 95 percent target-cluster upper confidence bounds are below every beneficial SESOI and no endpoint has a harmful lower bound
H3_shared_calibration.small_effect: small effect confirmed only if interval excludes zero but remains inside SESOI

H4_intervention_audit.deterministic_identity: for pair margin d and signed perturbation difference q, rank flips iff d*(d+q)<0; ties reported separately
H4_intervention_audit.primary_empirical_increment: target-cluster mean calibration slope or flip-rate increment beyond deterministic threshold-only prediction

H5_alpha_zero.local_derivative: central differences around zero for pairwise accuracy, top-k, coverage, and regret
H5_alpha_zero.T2_cross_fit: construction split A estimates candidate class-gradient; split B evaluates measurement; target evaluation is held out
H5_alpha_zero.T3_HO: descriptive replay of the full locked symmetric grid; no T3 option selection

models: raw M plus effective multiplicity plus top gap
target and trajectory adjusted stratified contrasts
H6_candidate_count.primary_attribution: effective multiplicity/top-gap rather than raw M if raw-M coefficient loses sign or material magnitude after adjustment
H6_candidate_count.blocked_permutation: shuffle actionability outcomes within target and trajectory-compatible blocks

required_checks: source and target preprocessing paths resolve
model factory and input shape resolve
penultimate representation hook returns stable [batch,dim] tensor
classifier W and b resolve from state_dict/module ABI
representation z and Wdotz schema validates
storage/runtime estimate fits external content-addressed cache policy
instrumentation_readiness.source_and_Wz_feasible: all required checks pass without training and without real-data forward
instrumentation_readiness.source_only_feasible: source path/logit schema pass but representation hook or Wdotz identity fails
instrumentation_readiness.new_training_required: frozen model ABI cannot expose representation needed for the trace
instrumentation_readiness.blocker: data, preprocessing, checkpoint, or model ABI cannot be resolved

replication_architecture.R1: frozen re-inference-only strict-source and representation/Wdotz instrumentation; future explicit authorization required
replication_architecture.R2: reserved seeds 3 and 4 checkpoint-field replication; future locked protocol and explicit authorization required
replication_architecture.R3: independent targets or dataset including possible BNCI2014_004; future locked protocol and explicit authorization required
replication_architecture.minimum_stage_rule: recommend R1 if instrumentation feasible; recommend R2/R3 only after R1 evidence or an R1 blocker

failure_gates: C72 protocol, result, cache, view, metric, or repair-ledger replay mismatch
C73 row-level outcome access before protocol commit
decomposition dominance claimed without order and interval robustness
unexplained residual relabeled as gauge without construct-validity gates
shared calibration called insufficient from p-value alone
deterministic H4 crossing identity called empirical gauge validation
T3-HO tunes alpha or intervention family
raw M effect claimed without effective multiplicity and top-gap adjustment
representation claim without dummy Wdotz ABI identity
strict-source checkpoint metadata relabeled as source trial evidence
raw cache, checkpoint identifier, selector, recommendation, training, real EEG forward, GPU, heldout dataset, reserved seed, manuscript, target-population, or minimax claim
